paragraphs.text: November 11 2008, 20:23

paragraphs.text: This is the Ilonggo version of the short script I made yesterday.  I changed some parts here and made the conversation more in tune to the personality of the young people here inBacolod.
paragraphs.html: This is the Ilonggo version of the short script I made yesterday.  I changed some parts here and made the conversation more in tune to the personality of the young people here in Bacolod.

paragraphs.text: Characters:
paragraphs.html: Characters:

paragraphs.text: JAMES – 25 years old, good looking, tall, is into a relationship with Crissy who is vacationing in another region, happy-go-lucky, became close friends with Elle few months back.
paragraphs.html: JAMES – 25 years old, good looking, tall, is into a relationship with Crissy who is vacationing in another region, happy-go-lucky, became close friends with Elle few months back.

paragraphs.text: ELLE – 23 years old, headstrong, has not had a boyfriend since birth, independent girl with strong convictions about relationships, values freedom, secretive of her feelings but is opinionated, became close friends with James few months back.
paragraphs.html: ELLE – 23 years old, headstrong, has not had a boyfriend since birth, independent girl with strong convictions about relationships, values freedom, secretive of her feelings but is opinionated, became close friends with James few months back.

paragraphs.text: SETTING: Elle’s Living Room
paragraphs.html: SETTING: Elle’s Living Room

paragraphs.text: (James enters the room)
paragraphs.html: (James enters the room)

paragraphs.text: ELLE:  Uy James, paki sira bi mayo sang pwertahan.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Uy James, paki sira bi mayo sang pwertahan.

paragraphs.text: (James shuts the door)
paragraphs.html: (James shuts the door)

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Oist Elle!  Lakat d bala!  May pakita ko sa imo.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Oist Elle!  Lakat d bala!  May pakita ko sa imo.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ano  na?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ano  na?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Picture sang gf ko.  Gwapa ay?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Picture sang gf ko.  Gwapa ay?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:K lang.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  K lang.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Anong k lang man?  Gwapa lang gid.  Gina padayaw ko gid ni siya gani sa mga migo ko.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Anong k lang man?  Gwapa lang gid.  Gina padayaw ko gid ni siya gani sa mga migo ko.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ah yuga?  Mayo eh.  Ano na kamo ni kadugay?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ah yuga?  Mayo eh.  Ano na kamo ni kadugay?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  7 months.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  7 months.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Baw, nag patol man siya sa imo?  Pila grado ka mata ya ni man?  Pano mo ni siya gin aswang?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Baw, nag patol man siya sa imo?  Pila grado ka mata ya ni man?  Pano mo ni siya gin aswang?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Aswang ka da.  Siya naton nag aswang sakon.  Siya ni ya nangaluyag sakon.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Aswang ka da.  Siya naton nag aswang sakon.  Siya ni ya nangaluyag sakon.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Hmph.  Shit.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Hmph.  Shit.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:Tuod man.  Amo ni ho:  There was this girl that called me up if pwede kami ka date.  I told her I’ll think about it.  Syempre, pamahal mahal man ko daan.  Gwapo mo.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Tuod man.  Amo ni ho:  There was this girl that called me up if pwede kami ka date.  I told her I’ll think about it.  Syempre, pamahal mahal man ko daan.  Gwapo mo.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Yuck.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Yuck.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Then that time, tupad ko si Crissy.  Friends pa lang kami to that time.  As soon as I hang up the phone siling ya “Why not date me instead?”  Teh end of story eh.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Then that time, tupad ko si Crissy.  Friends pa lang kami to that time.  As soon as I hang up the phone siling ya “Why not date me instead?”  Teh end of story eh.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Shadoo kadasig.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Shadoo kadasig.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Ayos na ya.  La na duro gamo kag drama.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Ayos na ya.  La na duro gamo kag drama.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Teh diin siya subong?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Teh diin siya subong?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  She’s on a long vacation with relatives.  Sige lang when she returns I’ll introduce you.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  She’s on a long vacation with relatives.  Sige lang when she returns I’ll introduce you.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Hidlaw ka man ay?
paragraphs.html: ELLE: Hidlaw ka man ay?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  So-so.  Naanad naman ko layo siya.  And oh!  Gin sunlog ko siya last night sa phone.  I told her about you and I said mas gwapa ka pa sa iya.  Nangakig siya.  Hambal ya “Do you like her?”  Sabat ko, “Maybe.”
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  So-so.  Naanad naman ko layo siya.  And oh!  Gin sunlog ko siya last night sa phone.  I told her about you and I said mas gwapa ka pa sa iya.  Nangakig siya.  Hambal ya “Do you like her?”  Sabat ko, “Maybe.”

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ka gago sa imo noh?  Why would you do that?  Gin gamit mo pa ko.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ka gago sa imo noh?  Why would you do that?  Gin gamit mo pa ko.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  It’s fun lang nga gaselos siya.  Ok lang na  a nga gin gamit ta ka.  Wala man may ga gamit sa imo. Haha.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  It’s fun lang nga gaselos siya.  Ok lang na  a nga gin gamit ta ka.  Wala man may ga gamit sa imo. Haha.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:(slaps James on his arm)  Bastos ka!
paragraphs.html: ELLE: (slaps James on his arm)  Bastos ka!

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Pero tuod man Elle.  Ngaa wala ka pa migo haw?  Ngita bala.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pero tuod man Elle.  Ngaa wala ka pa migo haw?  Ngita bala.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Kag mag ano?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Kag mag ano?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Mag ano eh… (laughs)
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Mag ano eh… (laughs)

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Gago.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Gago.

paragraphs.text: JAMES: I mean, para someone will take care of you.
paragraphs.html: JAMES: I mean, para someone will take care of you.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:I can take care of myself.  Indi ko na kinanglan.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  I can take care of myself.  Indi ko na kinanglan.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Baskog.  Hadlok ka masakitan haw?  Sa una man lang na ang sakit.  Happy happy joy joy na na sa ulihe.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Baskog.  Hadlok ka masakitan haw?  Sa una man lang na ang sakit.  Happy happy joy joy na na sa ulihe.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ay ambot sa imo da.  La gid ko kwaon sa imo.  Amo man na japon.  Mangita man na japon iban ang lalake.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ay ambot sa imo da.  La gid ko kwaon sa imo.  Amo man na japon.  Mangita man na japon iban ang lalake.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Teh babae amo man na gani.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Teh babae amo man na gani.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:James, why do men cheat?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  James, why do men cheat?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Coz indi na sila happy sa relationship kag daw las-ay na.  What about women?  Why do you cheat?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Coz indi na sila happy sa relationship kag daw las-ay na.  What about women?  Why do you cheat?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:For the same reasons.  And bored na.  And maybe because of the thrill also.  Masarap ang bawal.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  For the same reasons.  And bored na.  And maybe because of the thrill also.  Masarap ang bawal.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Huo.  Daw pareho lang na nga every meal mo everyday pareho imo sud-an.  Daw masuka ka na.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Huo.  Daw pareho lang na nga every meal mo everyday pareho imo sud-an.  Daw masuka ka na.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:So piliton mo japon kay kinanglan kay kanugon man huyangan.  Bisan pan-os, ubos!
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  So piliton mo japon kay kinanglan kay kanugon man huyangan.  Bisan pan-os, ubos!

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (laughs)  Diin mo na ginapanguha man?  Pero ha, faithful ko ya sa miga ko.  I cannot betray Crissy.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (laughs)  Diin mo na ginapanguha man?  Pero ha, faithful ko ya sa miga ko.  I cannot betray Crissy.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ah sus!  Guys always say that.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ah sus!  Guys always say that.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  I’m not a bad guy Elle.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  I’m not a bad guy Elle.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:I know.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  I know.

paragraphs.text: ----Silence----
paragraphs.html: ----Silence----

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  But I’m not a saint either.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  But I’m not a saint either.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Meaning what?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Meaning what?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (laughs)  I’m a man.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (laughs)  I’m a man.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:(imitates James)  “I’m a man”.  Huo na.  Manyak manyakon ka man daan.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  (imitates James)  “I’m a man”.  Huo na.  Manyak manyakon ka man daan.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (smiles)  If I don’t have a girlfriend I will ask you out.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (smiles)  If I don’t have a girlfriend I will ask you out.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Right.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Right.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Pero indi eh.  Crissy will kill me.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pero indi eh.  Crissy will kill me.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:You shouldn’t.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  You shouldn’t.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (laughs) Pati man siya ho.  Haha Ambisyon todo Elle. Haha
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (laughs) Pati man siya ho.  Haha Ambisyon todo Elle. Haha

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Kapal mo.  Daw luy-a lang gid chura mo.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Kapal mo.  Daw luy-a lang gid chura mo.

paragraphs.text: ----Silence----
paragraphs.html: ----Silence----

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Amo nalang ni ho.  Buligan ta ka pangita ideal man mo.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Amo nalang ni ho.  Buligan ta ka pangita ideal man mo.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:No thank you.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  No thank you.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Na bala!  Abnormal ka karon ah!  Gin tawo ka d para i-share mo blessings mo.  Indi kay tago taguon mo imo grasya.  Ano gani hambal sa ebanghilyo?  “Kamo nga mga tao, sampawi inyo isig ka tawo, ilubong inyo kinatawo, para maka ubra kamo tao>”  Oh teh?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Na bala!  Abnormal ka karon ah!  Gin tawo ka d para i-share mo blessings mo.  Indi kay tago taguon mo imo grasya.  Ano gani hambal sa ebanghilyo?  “Kamo nga mga tao, sampawi inyo isig ka tawo, ilubong inyo kinatawo, para maka ubra kamo tao>”  Oh teh?

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Perv ka.  Do you know that?  Sa diin na ya nga ebanghilyo nagtuhaw?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Pila ka na gani?  23?  Dasig dasiga basi ma biyaan ka sang last trip.  Beinte tres?  Dapat nakalimaka na ya.  Pigaw haw?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pila ka na gani?  23?  Dasig dasiga basi ma biyaan ka sang last trip.  Beinte tres?  Dapat naka lima ka na ya.  Pigaw haw?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:James, abi tuluka ko.  Himutari mayo.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  James, abi tuluka ko.  Himutari mayo.

paragraphs.text: JAMES: Ang ano?  (looks at her chest)
paragraphs.html: JAMES: Ang ano?  (looks at her chest)

paragraphs.text: ELLE:(Hits him in the head)  Tarong!  Daw chewing gum bala chura ko nga gina pasa pasahan sang mga lalake?  Indi ko nay a gusto.  Gusto ko isa lang and amo na na.
paragraphs.html: ELLE: (Hits him in the head)  Tarong!  Daw chewing gum bala chura ko nga gina pasa pasahan sang mga lalake?  Indi ko nay a gusto.  Gusto ko isa lang and amo na na.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Shado man guro ka taas expectations mo.  Gapangita ka perfect man?  Ngaa haw?  Perpekto ka haw?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Shado man guro ka taas expectations mo.  Gapangita ka perfect man?  Ngaa haw?  Perpekto ka haw?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Nag siling ko haw?  And may right man ko ya mag pa taas expectations ko.  We usually get less that what we have settled for.  Why would I choose shit if I can have cake?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Nag siling ko haw?  And may right man ko ya mag pa taas expectations ko.  We usually get less that what we have settled for.  Why would I choose shit if I can have cake?

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Umm… kung medyo law-ay law-ayon ka I would understand why you don’t have a bf.  But gwapa ka man.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Bola bola tres pesos lang.

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  What I mean is, daw indi man gid halata nga nag halin ka sa amo. hahaha

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ah amo na gale ha?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ah amo na gale ha?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Pati ah.  Tuod man.  Gwapa ka pro.  You know what, feeling ko angayan ka kung long straight hair ka.  Amo gid na mga type ko daan sa girl.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pati ah.  Tuod man.  Gwapa ka pro.  You know what, feeling ko angayan ka kung long straight hair ka.  Amo gid na mga type ko daan sa girl.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Good.  I’ll keep it short then.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Good.  I’ll keep it short then.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (laughs)  Pero that one already looks good on you.  Dba laba laba ka buhok sang una?  Pautdan mo haw?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (laughs)  Pero that one already looks good on you.  Dba laba laba ka buhok sang una?  Pautdan mo haw?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Natak-an ko ah.  Daw ma double ko sa Ju-on.  Kung amo lang na permi, BORING!  La gid bag-o.  Pero lantawa bala dasig ni maglaba liwat.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Natak-an ko ah.  Daw ma double ko sa Ju-on.  Kung amo lang na permi, BORING!  La gid bag-o.  Pero lantawa bala dasig ni maglaba liwat.

paragraphs.html: JAMES: (laughs hard)

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Na ano ka?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Don’t you know that there’s a study that says that if dasig mag laba buhok mo, permi ka kuno gapaminsar sexual thoughts!  Waaaaah.  Nasa loob ang kulo!
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Don’t you know that there’s a study that says that if dasig mag laba buhok mo, permi ka kuno gapaminsar sexual thoughts!  Waaaaah.  Nasa loob ang kulo!

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ginago eh!  Pinalagpat.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ginago eh!  Pinalagpat.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  HAHA You think about sex noh?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  HAHA You think about sex noh?

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  I do not!  Ikaw guro.  Daw sang san-o ka man lang nagpagunting daw naglaba naman ho.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Syempre ako pa ya.  (laughs).  Ano na nga gina basa mo man?  (looks over the magazine)  Wow!  Kiera Knightley.  Dream girl.  Daw ding ding galling ang tubang.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Suyaan.  Why?  What do you think about women with small breasts?

paragraphs.text: JAMES: (thinks)  Oh!  Definitely not you!
paragraphs.html: JAMES: (thinks)  Oh!  Definitely not you!

paragraphs.html: ELLE: (hits him with the magazine) Bastos ka animal ka.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Indi bala.  Basi mag laba nagid ni karon buhok ko.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Indi bala.  Basi mag laba nagid ni karon buhok ko.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  So ano gid gina pangita mo sa guy haw?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  So ano gid gina pangita mo sa guy haw?

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  The thing is, I’m not looking at all.

paragraphs.text: JAMES: Because?
paragraphs.html: JAMES: Because?

paragraphs.html: ELLE: I don’t feel the need to have a boyfriend.

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Because you want a girlfriend.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  What?!

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Type mo na guro and miga nga upod upod mo permi ay?

paragraphs.html: ELLE: Do I look like a lesbian?

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  You’re not interested in guys.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  What made you so sure?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Do you like somebody?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Do you like somebody?

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Sin-o?

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Secret.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Can you keep a secret?

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Shado ka swabe.  Ihambal na na bala.  Sin-o na?  Isa gid na sa mg amigo ko ay?

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  I don’t need to.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Namian man siya sa imo haw?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Namian man siya sa imo haw?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ambot ah.  Wala guro.

paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pano mo na mabal-an kung indi mo pagsugid sa iya?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:I’m not that kind of girl.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Wala na ya sa pa kind kind of girl.  Naton, hadlok ka lang ma reject.  Ari ho, may isa ka nami nga balay.  Dream house mo.  Paglabay mo sa gwa, kita mo bukas ang pwertahan.  Daw naga pang invite gid sa imo magsulod.  Indi ka man lang mag tika to see what’s inside?
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Wala na ya sa pa kind kind of girl.  Naton, hadlok ka lang ma reject.  Ari ho, may isa ka nami nga balay.  Dream house mo.  Paglabay mo sa gwa, kita mo bukas ang pwertahan.  Daw naga pang invite gid sa imo magsulod.  Indi ka man lang mag tika to see what’s inside?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Tempting gid but indi na akon balay eh.  So bisan bukas pa ang puerta, wala ko right magsulod kay indi man ko tagbalay.  Basi tirohon pa ko sang tag-iya.  Masal-an trespassing or kawatan.

paragraphs.html: ELLE:  If the risk is worth taking.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Sigurado ka?  Kag ngaa daw mapatay ka gid nga mag migo na ko?  Daw ikaw pa nahadlok para sa akon. Are you afraid of something?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Sigurado ka?  Kag ngaa daw mapatay ka gid nga mag migo na ko?  Daw ikaw pa nahadlok para sa akon. Are you afraid of something?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  What the hell?  Kung may nahadlok d, ikaw na.    May miga na ko ya. Wala na ko dapat ikahadlok.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  What the hell?  Kung may nahadlok d, ikaw na.    May miga na ko ya. Wala na ko dapat ikahadlok.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Are you saying that to me or to yourself?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Are you saying that to me or to yourself?

paragraphs.text: ----Silence----
paragraphs.html: ----Silence----

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Ambot sa imo. Tig-a ulo.  Malay mo man, maybe he likes you too.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Ambot sa imo. Tig-a ulo.  Malay mo man, maybe he likes you too.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:It doesn’t matter.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  It doesn’t matter.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Maybe it does.  Wala ka lang kabalo.  Elle, lakat na ko dugay dugay.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Maybe it does.  Wala ka lang kabalo.  Elle, lakat na ko dugay dugay.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Okay.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Okay.

paragraphs.text: ----Silence----
paragraphs.html: ----Silence----

paragraphs.text: JAMES: Umm… teh okay ka lang d?
paragraphs.html: JAMES: Umm… teh okay ka lang d?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Yeah.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Yeah.

paragraphs.text: (looks at each other awkwardly)
paragraphs.html: (looks at each other awkwardly)

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Lakat na ko guro.  Umm… Just keep in mind that you’re a wonderful girl Elle.  Really.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Lakat na ko guro.  Umm… Just keep in mind that you’re a wonderful girl Elle.  Really.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Okay thank you.  I think you are a good guy James.  Crissy is lucky to have you.  Halong.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Okay thank you.  I think you are a good guy James.  Crissy is lucky to have you.  Halong.

paragraphs.text: (James stands up and walks to the door and opened it halfway and hesitates to leave)
paragraphs.html: (James stands up and walks to the door and opened it halfway and hesitates to leave)

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  I love my girlfriend.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  I love my girlfriend.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Sure.
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Sure.

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  (turns back to Elle in anger)  Dali lang gid bala!  Nga-a amo ka na haw? !
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  (turns back to Elle in anger)  Dali lang gid bala!  Nga-a amo ka na haw? !

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ano problema mo ya?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ano problema mo ya?

paragraphs.text: JAMES: Ngaa kabudlay gid sa imo dal-on?
paragraphs.html: JAMES: Ngaa kabudlay gid sa imo dal-on?

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Dal-on?  Ano abi mo sakon stuffed toy?
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Dal-on?  Ano abi mo sakon stuffed toy?

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Dipuga abnormal ka!
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Dipuga abnormal ka!

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Yuga mo eh!
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Yuga mo eh!

paragraphs.text: JAMES: Talawit!
paragraphs.html: JAMES: Talawit!

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Manyak!
paragraphs.html: ELLE: Manyak!

paragraphs.text: JAMES: LA-ON!
paragraphs.html: JAMES: LA-ON!

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Panulay ka!
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Panulay ka!

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Pareho lang ta.
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Pareho lang ta.

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Ano gid bala problema mo?!
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Ano gid bala problema mo?!

paragraphs.text: JAMES:  Problema ko?  I love you!!!
paragraphs.html: JAMES:  Problema ko?  I love you!!!

paragraphs.text: ELLE:Teh problema gid na?  I love you too!!!!
paragraphs.html: ELLE:  Teh problema gid na?  I love you too!!!!

paragraphs.text: ----Silence---- (look at each other breathlessly)
paragraphs.html: ----Silence---- (look at each other breathlessly)

paragraphs.text: (James bends down to kiss Elle)
paragraphs.html: (James bends down to kiss Elle)

paragraphs.text: Elle:James, sirad-i bi anay mayo ang pwertahan…
paragraphs.html: Elle:  James, sirad-i bi anay mayo ang pwertahan…

paragraphs.text: Lights Out.
paragraphs.html: Lights Out.
